title: 50 Pcs City Stickers for Kid Teens Girls Boys Adults,Travel City Transparent Stickers for Laptop,Water Bottles,Bicycle,Skateboard,Computer,Waterproof Vinyl for Wall,Graffiti Stickers Pack
features: 【Sticker Bomb Pack】Contains 50 Pcs City Stickers.The size of each sticker is about 5-8 cm.Our sticker is 125% brand new,without repetition and made with non-repetitive patterns.Ours stickers are great for beautifying objects and covering scratches.Compliments and good mood are guaranteed!

【High Quality】We use high-precision printing technology and the patterns are accurate and clear. High quality PVC waterproof vinyl stickers.Remove the adhesive from the back and use it directly. with sun protection and waterproof function Easy to remove and doesn't leave any residue behind.Don't worry about losing viscosity due to humidity when you take them to swimming pools, beaches, camping or other outdoor places.

【Multiple Choice】Perfect customization of your water bottles, cups, wardrobes, books, children's books, trucks, skis, refrigerators, bicycles, motorcycles, toolboxes,suitcases, laptops, helmets, cars, unique mobile phone cases, and lightweight coverage.

【Surprise Gift】Cool stickers are the best gifts for children, and gifts for men and women. Whether adults, children, teenagers, friends, lovers, teachers, little boys or girls are very meaningful. Trusted brand stickers will enrich your life with dazzling and unique appearance.
【Satisfied Service】If you encounter product problems, please don't hesitate to send us an email. We will try our best to solve the problem, and our goal is to make our customers 100% satisfied.
description: Quantity: 50 pieces pack Size:2-3 inch / 5-8 cm Material:Sun protection and waterproof Vinyl Questions&Answers Q:Are our stickers waterproof? A:Yes, Our Stickers are made of superior vinyl PVC. It’s waterproof and sun-proof. Q:Do stickers leave residue? A:No. Made with the non-marking glue, it will not leave any residue when transferring or removing, and will not damage the surface of the sticker. Q:Are stickers reusable? A:Yes. Reusable and removable. This means that you can remove the sticker anytime .You can also easily replace the current sticker with a new one and reuse the same sticker later on.
